revisedPrompt:
Generate exactly one PNG image: a game-development pixel-art animated sprite sheet.

Canvas and sheet contract:
- Exact image size: 2048x512 px.
- Grid layout: 1 row x 4 equal columns, each frame is 512x512 px.
- No visible grid lines, separator lines, borders, frame numbers, labels, text, UI, logos, or watermark.
- Background in every empty area: perfectly solid #FF00FF chroma-key magenta, no gradients, no texture, no noise.
- Leave a clean solid #FF00FF margin between the character and every cell edge.

Style:
- SNES / 16-bit-inspired high-resolution pixel art, crisp low-resolution pixel clusters, no antialiasing blur.
- Consistent palette, bright cheerful colors, dark one-pixel outline where useful, top-left light source.
- Fine readable pixel clusters suitable for a large boss sprite.
- Sheet must be clean: no detached fragments, no isolated pixel islands, no seam slivers, no dust specks, no leftover effect residue.

Reference matching:
- Use the attached reference image as the exact character guide.
- Re-pose the same Rock-Oni King mountain guardian, not a redesign.
- Match the reference proportions, head-to-body ratio, broad rounded stone body, heavy pillar-like arms, mossy boulder surfaces, small flowers, two short stone horns, sad amber glowing eyes, outline style, palette balance, and pixel density.
- Same character identity and exact same scale in all four frames.
- Keep head size, head-to-body ratio, body width, limb thickness, and standing body height consistent across all frames.
- Feet stay on the same ground line in every frame.

Character:
- Original mythical-Japan action RPG boss sprite: Rock-Oni King / Ganki no Ou.
- Huge gentle mountain guardian made of mossy boulders.
- Rounded stone body, arms like weathered rock pillars, deep green moss and tiny flowers on shoulders, two short stone horns, sorrowful glowing amber eyes.
- Wisps of black-purple impurity mist cling to the lower half only.
- Sorrowful and majestic, gentle rather than frightening.
- Front 3/4 view facing downward toward the viewer.

Animation frames, left to right:
1. Neutral looming idle pose.
2. Slow breath in: shoulders and chest boulders rise slightly; impurity mist swirls close to the lower body.
3. Breath held: moss and small flowers sway gently while body remains the same scale.
4. Breath out: body settles slightly lower while feet remain on the same ground line; pose loops naturally back to frame 1.

Originality and exclusions:
- Do not resemble any existing game character, franchise mascot, logo, emblem, or named IP.
- No samurai armor, kabuto helmet, ninja outfit, two-sword daisho, gun, modern object, horror mood, dark gloomy palette, bird, companion creature, letter emblem, modern text, watermark, or UI.

Critical consistency requirements:
- Each frame stays fully inside its own 512x512 cell.
- Same subject scale in every cell, drawn large and filling most of the cell with a small margin.
- Re-pose only; do not redraw, resize, restyle, or change character identity between frames.
